ValidationRule.description: Les profils contentia ne peuvent pas choisir les autres motifs de demande
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.CS001_NeutraliserRegles__c.TECH_NeutraliserRegleValidation__c), (CONTAINS(( $Profile.Name ),"Contentia")), NOT (ISPICKVAL(Reason, "Confirmation de règlement")), NOT (ISPICKVAL(Reason, "Contestation/litiges")), NOT (ISPICKVAL(Reason, "Geste Commercial")), NOT (ISPICKVAL(Reason, "Résiliation (Contentia)")), NOT (ISPICKVAL(Reason, "Attente VE")), NOT (ISPICKVAL(Reason, "Prêt financier (BNP PF)")), NOT (ISPICKVAL(Reason, "Duplicata facture")), NOT (ISPICKVAL(Reason, "Rematerialisation BI")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Le motif choisi n’est pas sélectionnable.
